overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a grand gothic great hall with high vaulted wooden ceilings and tall stained glass windows. A robed character walks slowly down the central aisle between long wooden dining tables where other students sit, with warm natural light streaming through the windows illuminating the stone interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with dining tables and high vaulted ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking slowly down the central aisle away from the camera, moving toward the far end of the great hall between rows of dining tables

notable_agents.action: student sitting at wooden table reading a book in the foreground
student seated at table near the stone wall

entered.detail: ornate wooden truss ceiling with dark beams arching high above the hall
tall gothic arched windows with colorful panes allowing bright light to stream in
long dark wooden tables with benches where students are seated
dark stone walls with wooden paneling and framed portraits
vertical banners hanging from the upper walls
large wrought iron chandelier hanging from the ceiling
blue patterned runner rug along the central aisle

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary in a grand gothic great hall, capturing a robed character walking slowly down the central aisle away from the viewer. Students sit at long wooden dining tables on either side, some reading or conversing, while warm sunlight streams through tall stained glass windows on the right, illuminating the stone walls and high vaulted wooden ceiling.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady, atmospheric view of a grand gothic great hall as a lone figure recedes into the distance. It begins with a stationary perspective focusing on a robed character walking slowly down the central aisle away from the viewer. As the character progresses, the camera emphasizes the scale of the environment, framing the students seated at long wooden dining tables who are reading or conversing. The scene is defined by warm sunlight streaming through tall stained glass windows on the right, which casts a golden glow across the stone walls and high vaulted wooden ceiling.
